ManagedAttribute.displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps in all chats [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any chat, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.
Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps in all chats [on] Microsoft Graph
